overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The character moves from under an overpass, across a busy intersection with holographic advertisements, and continues along the sidewalk past street vendors and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass toward the illuminated intersection ahead

entered.detail: elevated highway with massive support columns and purple neon underlighting
tall cylindrical structure with rotating circular holographic advertisement screens
multi-story building with large glowing digital advertisements and purple neon trim
black and yellow bollards separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the road
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb with reflective wet surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive overpass structure bathed in purple and blue neon light. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant signage from nearby buildings as the character approaches a distant intersection dominated by a circular holographic tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character stops at the crosswalk waiting for the traffic signal to change
character begins crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians holding umbrellas

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket holding black umbrella crossing the street alongside ego

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Carmel'
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines with 'WAIT' text visible
vertical traffic signal showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open intersection dominated by a massive circular holographic tower. After waiting at the red light, the character crosses the wet street alongside a man in an orange jacket with an umbrella, passing beneath the 'Carmel' street sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with street vendors and neon storefronts

events.description: passing a street food vendor cart setup on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past pedestrians and a street food vendor while rain falls

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing beside food cart with red umbrella and cooking equipment

entered.detail: food stall with red umbrella, cooking grills, and illuminated menu displays
blue illuminated public bench on the sidewalk
large building with distinctive illuminated dome roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk past a street vendor selling food under a red umbrella. The circular holographic tower recedes into the background as the character moves deeper into the neon-lit commercial district, passing other pedestrians and illuminated storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a massive overpass into the wide, neon-drenched expanse of a bustling city intersection. It begins beneath the heavy concrete structure bathed in purple and blue light, where the wet asphalt reflects vibrant signage as the character advances toward a distant holographic tower. As the character emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a bright intersection where they wait at a red light before crossing the rain-slicked street alongside a man with an umbrella and passing beneath a Carmel street sign. The camera then follows the character onto the opposite sidewalk, moving past a food vendor under a red umbrella while the holographic tower recedes into the background. Finally, the view shifts deeper into the commercial district, gliding past illuminated storefronts and pedestrians under the glow of the city's night lights.
